name: Imuraya Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Imuraya Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various food products in Japan and internationally. The company offers confectionary, including bean jellies, and sponge and pan cakes; processed food, such as bean paste, sweet porridge, and canned and pouched steamed rice; steamed bun with meat fillings and sweetened bean fillings; ice creams; tofu and refrigerated products; and powdered seasoning products. It also manages a restaurant and bakery; and provides property management, insurance, and leasing agency services. The company was founded in 1896 and is based in Tsu, Japan.
